tokens: (Perhaps reaching for the map) Got it.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Pause) Can you turn on the 2 Drive Power for me?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Yeah, the up one's up, and the down one's down.
You're in as bad a position as I am.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Dave, we're thinking we want to drive over towards that large block, and if you think it's reasonable, we'll ask about a 15-minute stop there.
And afterwards, we'll move on towards the fresh crater.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Oh, I think that's a good idea.
I don't think we're going to get any more variety of anything by going farther to the east on the Front, Joe.
I think we've seen the variety that we're going to see, except for working our way back.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Dave, we agree precisely with that down here.
We think...From your descriptions, that's exactly what we've been reading and that's why we want you to move to the west.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Now here's a little fresh crater, Jim, with white albedo, but I think that's probably a secondary.
I don't think that's excavated anything, do you?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I hope you...It's just over the ridge, I guess.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Yes, we'll take it sort of slow here going down-Sun.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: And you might want to start the DAC.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Bearing 345; range...(Responding to Joe) Yeah, I'm glad you reminded me.
(Pause) Remind me to stop it when we get there.
(Pause) Boy, you know, looking upslope, look how much more hummocky it is.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Thinking about it) Pretty hummocky and driving is much sportier.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I hope you stay above it.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Laughing) What do you think we ought to do here, Jim?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I wish I could lean uphill!
transcript.speaker: Irwin
